mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name, u.phone FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.owner_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
SELECT m.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name, u.phone FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.owner_id = u.id ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT m.*, u.id as uid, u.real_name, u.phone FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.owner_id = u.id WHERE m.status = 0 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message(owner_id, title, content, status, create_time) VALUES(#{ownerId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET reply = #{reply}, status = 1, reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
